title: corybas dilatatus
intro: Corybas dilatatus, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Corybas dilatatus include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
